query:
-- Today in America/New_York
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scheduleBlocks
     WHERE DATE(CONVERT_TZ(FROM_UNIXTIME(startTime/1000), '+00:00', 'America/New_York'))
         = DATE(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', 'America/New_York'))) AS blocks_today,
  (SELECT MIN(FROM_UNIXTIME(startTime/1000)) FROM scheduleBlocks
     WHERE DATE(CONVERT_TZ(FROM_UNIXTIME(startTime/1000), '+00:00', 'America/New_York'))
         = DATE(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', 'America/New_York'))) AS first_block_today_utc,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scheduleBlocks
     WHERE startTime >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW())*1000
       AND startTime <  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW())*1000 + 7*86400*1000) AS blocks_next_7d,
  (SELECT MAX(FROM_UNIXTIME(startTime/1000)) FROM scheduleBlocks) AS latest_scheduled_block_utc,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scheduleBlocks) AS total_blocks_all_time;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scheduleBlocks
     WHERE startTime >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW())*1000
